horoscope: While you're laying low to some degree, your mind is busy today, dear Aries. You could connect with someone who shares an interest or with whom you feel comfortable communicating your pet interests and ideas. Negotiating, mediating, or leading and guiding others on a particular subject can be in focus. Transits today and tomorrow spark especially creative, unique, and helpful ideas. You want to free yourself from ideas and attitudes that have limited you in the past and distinguish yourself from others, discovering what makes you special. People tend to see you for your unique mind or viewpoint right now — you are going your own way. It's a potentially excellent time to clear away problems or at least get a better handle on how to resolve them.

Someone may be having an incredible influence on your personal awareness today, dear Taurus, and you might also be helping others to discover important things about themselves. More trust and faith may develop through your interactions now, and it feels good. It's also a time to take an inventory of your feelings, to adopt a new approach to understanding a tricky situation, or to play a supportive role for others. You may be opening up about a personal issue, or you could be listening to someone else's big reveal. Either way, an open mind helps. Unloading a mental burden may figure strongly now.

Today is excellent for bonding with others, dear Gemini, and personal enjoyment as well. You're coming across quite well, and others are bringing out the very best in you. If there is a relationship that needs extra care, this can be a good time to pay it the attention it deserves. While today is good for bringing more creative elements to what you do, you can be in a great spot to receive the information you need or the perfect encouraging words. A pleasingly open atmosphere with friends can figure strongly, even if there is some upheaval involved. Airing things out can be a tad messy, but ultimately helpful and even healing. Conversations can be revealing, especially honest and intriguing. If there have been differences with a friend, this is an excellent time to work through them.

Feel-good energy is with you today, dear Cancer. You feel you can accomplish more of what you want to do, while rising above some of the concerns that have recently bogged you down. This can be an excellent time to learn from others and to teach something as well. Your intuition enhances your business sense, and the desire to improve, grow, and learn is strong and growing today and tomorrow. The focus should be on positive reinforcement right now. You might aim to take full advantage of any opportunity that arises to understand yourself and your "place" in the world. You have much to gain through listening and observing. At the same time, you are likely to have something valuable and wise to offer others. In many ways, you're turning over a new leaf when it comes to communicating more openly.

Today and tomorrow, you can be finding more value in the connections you make, dear Leo, and this is radiated in happy ways in what you're doing now. You want to make progress now, and getting over a mental hump or problem area seems the best route. There can be a focus on putting ideas in motion or communicating to put a matter behind you. People are sensitive today and tomorrow, both in compassionate and touchy ways, and to varying degrees. Aim to express yourself with more compassion and care for the best results now, ensuring others understand the intentions behind your words. There can be opportunities to learn that move you forward, or a sense of liberation on a mental level.

Business endeavors are especially favored, dear Virgo, as is networking. There's good energy with you for emotional connections and the work that goes into making relationships healthy and satisfying. Your capacity for achievement is great, and you could find that circumstances seem to be lining up in such a way that you're able to perform at your peak. This is a good time for examining your goals and ideas and deciding which ones are most attainable or reasonable. It's a powerful time to gain new insight into your feelings and relationships. Your instincts for research are spot on, and you gravitate to the information you need most naturally. Deeper thinking is also favored. You can thoroughly enjoy going your own way with your thoughts and ideas, and others may appreciate your wonderfully unusual and unique approach to understanding motivations. Your insight can impress and help someone.

Fortunate connections are possible today, dear Libra, and you're feeling strongly optimistic. It's a pleasant, opportunity-filled time for learning, publishing, expanding a project, or turning around an area of your life that needs special attention. Be confident and willing to extend yourself. You may now feel a calling towards a particular subject, and you may find yourself in the role of a go-between. The urge to grow and mature through relationship experiences is also strong now, and you benefit from this attitude. There is a willing spirit to learn from and through one another, and conversations can be especially open and revealing, perhaps a little too much so, but ultimately helpful. You may have the chance to resolve a problem with someone. Problem-solving is a theme.

You can be experiencing deeper desires and a need for a stronger connection with someone special or an in-depth project, dear Scorpio. You might discover how to control a part of yourself that previously controlled you, and this can boost your confidence. Opening up to others somehow invites more opportunities into your life. It's a strong time for finding new ways to heal, improve your health, or do your work. You could be discovering information or solving a problem that clears the path for new beginnings. Seeing patterns comes more easily, helping you put the pieces together. Try not to move forward on a new idea too quickly, but aim to learn whatever you can today. Spreading yourself too thin is unlikely to be good or successful for you at the moment. Thinking outside the box, following your instincts, or helping or guiding others comes naturally to you.

Connections with others can be especially helpful today and tomorrow, dear Sagittarius. Partnerships and close relationships can be pleasant and prosperous, if a little complicated. This is not a time when you are inclined to want to go it alone, and in fact, others' input can be constructive. There is more generosity and a spirit of goodwill in your interactions, which can be especially pleasing. Today and tomorrow are potentially solid for special communications. There can be cathartic release through a creative pursuit or a meaningful conversation with someone you care about. Communications and thoughts focus on healing, resolving problems, and the bigger picture, although they can certainly get into tricky territory today. You are going your own way when it comes to ideas about how to best approach matters related to romance, fun, entertainment, art, and children, and you can benefit greatly from doing so.

Today and tomorrow are particularly strong for letting go so that you can more fully appreciate the good in your life, dear Capricorn. You're in a good position to release resentment or negative feelings so you can move past an emotionally "stuck" place. You can be feeling exceptionally generous now. Attracting love or admirers is very likely, and this can involve the work that you do or the services you provide. It's a fine time to do a little something extra for others or to work through any differences you may have had on the job or with people with whom you share daily activities. You can feel particularly dedicated to your loved ones or home life right now, and significant conversations or deep thinking and insights can occur, particularly related to home, family, and your personal past. Resolving conflicts or solving problems can figure strongly. In fact, stress can lessen as you see the big picture. You stand to learn a great deal through open, honest communication right now.

Conditions and people in your life seem to support your efforts today, dear Aquarius, or at least allow you the pleasure of going about doing what you want to do without guilt or distraction. This is also a beautiful time for reaching fair agreements and boosting cooperation. Your spirit is generous now, and your desire to be the best you can be is in full bloom. Look for ways to relieve stress. You benefit from seeing things from a broader perspective today, and seeing a problem as a whole helps you draw conclusions and move forward. There can be an illuminating moment in which puzzle pieces seem to unite, and you see a matter more clearly. Revealing conversations can open your heart.

Energies today are strong for a general spirit of cooperation, dear Pisces. Interactions are mutually beneficial and supportive. It's easy to connect with people who share similar interests or ideas. Seeing both sides of the story and giving others the benefit of the doubt are at the heart of this. It's also a great time to solve problems or increase your understanding of a situation, and it's rewarding. You can enjoy special insight into your money situation and practical goals as you look at these things differently, approaching problems holistically. You may have extra-special, valuable advice to offer, and you're in a flexible, spirited mood. It's a time to map out long-range plans and ideas. Creative thinking figures strongly.
